items.description: Animates text sliding in from the left with a fade on scroll into view.
items.name: slide-in-text
items.title: Slide In Text

items.description: Image component that adapts quality and loading strategy based on real-time network speed.
items.name: network-image
items.title: Network Image

items.description: Animated underline that tracks hover/active state and slides beneath nav items. Use with data-link-index on list items.
items.name: animated-underline
items.title: Animated Underline

items.description: Sample navbar demonstrating AnimatedUnderline with hover and active states.
items.name: animated-underline-navbar
items.title: Animated Underline Navbar

items.description: Confetti celebration effect on click. Wraps any trigger element and fires particles on interaction.
items.name: party-popper
items.title: Party Popper

items.description: Scroll-linked parallax effect for images or content. Moves children on scroll for depth.
items.name: parallax-image
items.title: Parallax Image

items.description: Animated 404 page with subtle icon motion and reduced-motion support.
items.name: not-found-page
items.title: Not Found Page

items.description: Accessible dark mode toggle with View Transitions API support and icon, icon-label, or dual-tab variants.
items.name: theme-toggle
items.title: Theme Toggle

items.description: Text that decrypts character by character with a scramble effect. Trigger on scroll, hover, or mount.
items.name: text-scramble
items.title: Text Scramble

items.description: 3D card with tilt and holographic glare effect that follows the cursor.
items.name: tilt-card-glare
items.title: Tilt Card Glare

items.description: SVG path that draws itself on scroll, hover, or mount. Presets: diamond, circle, star, heart, arrow.
items.name: line-draw-svg
items.title: Line Draw SVG

items.description: Canvas particle trail that follows the cursor. Fixed overlay, customizable color and particle count.
items.name: fluid-cursor-trail
items.title: Fluid Cursor Trail

items.description: Typewriter effect that cycles through phrases with variable typing speed and blinking cursor.
items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter

items.description: macOS-style dock with magnetic cursor effect. Items scale and lift as cursor approaches.
items.name: magnetic-cursor-dock
items.title: Magnetic Cursor Dock

items.description: Living aurora background with multiple variants. Sunset, ocean, forest, lavender, ember, ice.
items.name: aurora-background
items.title: Aurora Background

items.description: Button with SVG path morph animation. Supports custom paths for idle, hover, loading, success.
items.name: svg-morph-button
items.title: SVG Morph Button

items.description: 400x400 Three.js particle field from SVG. lucide-react, react-icons, Heroicons, Tabler, Phosphor, and similar libs work out of the box. Cursor repel + spring home.
items.name: svg-particle
items.title: SVG Particle

items.description: Shadcn button that swaps between two labels (and optional icons) with a crossfade. Width stays put. No layout jump when copy changes.
items.name: swap-button
items.title: Swap Button

items.description: Grid that reveals items with wave-like stagger on scroll. Configurable columns and timing.
items.name: stagger-reveal-grid
items.title: Stagger Reveal Grid

items.description: SVG path that draws itself on mount. Pass path for custom shapes or text to render handwriting.
items.name: handwriting-svg
items.title: Handwriting SVG

items.description: Cards that stack and unstack with scroll. Gravity-style depth effect.
items.name: gravity-scroll-cards
items.title: Gravity Scroll Cards

items.description: Scroll-jacks the page when the video reaches the viewport top. Scrubs video forward/backward with wheel input.
items.name: scroll-linked-video-scrubber
items.title: Scroll-Linked Video Scrubber

items.description: Pinned section where vertical scroll drives horizontal gallery position. Same pattern as Scroll-Linked Video Scrubber.
items.name: horizontal-scroll-gallery
items.title: Horizontal Scroll Gallery

items.description: Circular layout with numbered cards. Scroll wheel rotates the circle. No scrollbar, finite cards.
items.name: infinite-circular-scroll
items.title: Infinite Circular Scroll

items.description: Cursor spotlight effect. Dimmed background with bright radial gradient following cursor.
items.name: cursor-spotlight
items.title: Cursor Spotlight

items.description: Fixed bar at the top that scales horizontally with scroll progress. Uses Framer Motion for smooth updates.
items.name: scroll-progress
items.title: Scroll Progress

items.description: Drag-resizable panels for dashboards, IDEs, and editors. Supports horizontal/vertical layout and dynamic panel count.
items.name: resizable-panels
items.title: Resizable Panels

items.description: Animated number counter that counts from 0 to target. Tabular nums prevent layout shift, respects reduced motion.
items.name: number-counter
items.title: Number Counter

items.description: Accessible tabs with icon support, sliding indicator, and optional content panels. Keyboard navigable.
items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs

items.description: Changes the page title to a custom message when the user switches away from the tab. Uses the Page Visibility API.
items.name: lonely-tab-title
items.title: Lonely Tab Title

items.description: Image component with Low Quality Image Placeholder (LQIP). Shows a blurred placeholder that fades into the full image on load.
items.name: lqip-image
items.title: LQIP Image
